message:
Hello Support Team,

I would like to report a Telegram clone account that is impersonating an official support group named "Group Official Support."

This account is clearly fake and is using a misleading identity to deceive users. It is not affiliated with any official organization and may be used for fraudulent or harmful activities.

Details of the clone account:
Username: @suport_group_ib710
Link: https://t.me/suport_group_ib710

This is a serious violation of Telegram policies regarding impersonation. I strongly request immediate review and action to remove or suspend this account to prevent further harm.

Thank you for your prompt attention.
link: abuse@telegram.org    support@telegram.org    dmca@telegram.org    security@telegram.org    legal@telegram.org    recover@telegram.org    privacy@telegram.org    press@telegram.org    business@telegram.org    developers@telegram.org    copyright@telegram.org    complaints@telegram.org    abuse@stel.com    support@stel.com    security@stel.com    dmca@stel.com    legal@stel.com    spam@telegram.org    scam@telegram.org    phishing@telegram.org    fraud@telegram.org    report@telegram.org    takedown@telegram.org    moderator@telegram.org    admin@telegram.org    ios@telegram.org    android@telegram.org    desktop@telegram.org    web@telegram.org    api@telegram.org    feedback@telegram.org    sticker@telegram.org    github@telegram.org    bot_support@telegram.org
